skills.name: Soul Devourer (食魂)
skills.desc: Exclusive effect. Before using Blazing Tails, SP Tamamo no Mae drains 3% of the ATK for all units on the battlefield (each target can be drained a max of 10 times) to increase his own ATK. The total ATK drained cannot exceed 60% of his initial ATK. When he is KO'd, all the drained ATK will be returned. | Upgrades: L2: Max ATK drained increases to 70%.; L3: Max ATK drained increases to 80%.; L4: Max ATK drained increases to 100%.; L5: Increases drained ATK to 6%.

skills.name: Blazing Tails (焚天九尾)
skills.desc: SP Tamamo no Mae launches 12 random attacks on enemies, dealing damage equal to 80% of his ATK with each strike. Damage is reduced by 20% for each subsequent strike on the same target. | Upgrades: L2: Damage increases to 88%.; L3: Damage increases to 96%.; L4: Damage increases to 104%.; L5: Damage reduction for each subsequent strike decreases to 15%.

skills.name: Paper Swallow (紙燕)
skills.desc: Kamimai attack a single target with a paper fan, dealing damage equal to 80% of her ATK. | Upgrades: L2: Damage increases to 85%.; L3: Damage increases to 90%.; L4: Damage increases to 100%.; L5: Also detonates all layers of Paper Blade on the target.

skills.name: Falling Papers (落紙)
skills.desc: When an enemy uses a skill, Kamimai gains a layer of Falling Papers (max of 1 layer), lasts for 1 turn. All debuffs and control effects on her are dispelled at the start of her turn and consuming an equal number of Falling Paper layers. Falling Papers (落紙) Buff, Status: Ignores 30 DEF. | Upgrades: L2: Max number of Falling Paper layers increases to 2.; L3: Each Falling Papers layer increases her DEF by 10%; L4: Max number of Falling Paper layers increases to 3.; L5: When using Dancing Papers, each layer of Falling Papers decreases the onibi cost by 1.

skills.name: Dancing Papers (紙刃飛揚)
skills.desc: Kamimai performs a spinning dance to conjure a whirlwind of flaying paper among all enemies, inflicting them with Paper Blade, lasts for 2 turns. Also deals indirect damage equal to 108% of her ATK. Paper Blade (紙刃) Debuff, Status: Deals indirect damage at the end of turn. Paper Blade will detonate if an enemy inflicted with it uses a skill, removing this status and dealing indirect damage equal to 108% of Kamimai's ATK. | Upgrades: L2: Indirect damage increases to 110% and Paper Blade ignores 100 DEF.; L3: Indirect damage increases to 112% and Paper Blade ignores 150 DEF.; L4: Indirect damage increases to 114% and Paper Blade ignores 200 DEF.; L5: Upon using this skill on enemies with Paper Blade, the duration is reset and inflicts an additional 154% of indirect damage equal to 154% of her ATK.

skills.name: Blazing Fire (梵天)
skills.desc: SP Shuten Douji commands a ball of flames to attack single target, dealing damage equal to 100% of his ATK. When he is in his Demoniac State, this skill changes to Torch the Sky. | Upgrades: L2: Damage increases to 105%.; L3: Damage increases to 110%.; L4: Damage increases to 115%.; L5: Damage increases to 125%.

skills.name: Torch the Sky (烈焰焚天/烈火梵天)
skills.desc: SP Shuten Douji calls forth a huge blazing comet to smash a single target, dealing damage equal to 196% of his ATK. Also inflicts splash damage to all other enemies, dealing true damage equal to 20% of the damage received by the initial target. Splash damage won't trigger his own soul effects. | Upgrades: L2: Damage increases to 206% and true damage increases to 25%.; L3: Damage increases to 216% and true damage increases to 30%.; L4: Damage increases to 226% and true damage increases to 35%.; L5: Damage increases to 245% and true damage increases to 40%.

skills.name: Inflamed (红莲/紅蓮)
skills.desc: SP Shuten Douji gains immunity to control effects and effects such as Banish. Also healing effects on him are reduced by 50%. Grants all allies High Spirit's Force. High Spirit's Force (大妖の力) Buff, Mark: Exclusive effect. Increases damage dealt by 1% per 1% of HP lost. Cannot be stacked. | Upgrades: L2: Reduced healing decreases to 40%.; L3: Increases damage reduction for all allies with High Spirit's Force by 1% per 1% of HP lost.; L4: Reduced healing decreases to 30%.; L5: Effect for High Spirit's Force is doubled on himself.

skills.name: Raging Blaze (天火怒焱/天火怒炎)
skills.desc: SP Shuten Douji unleashes a powerful demoniac force and sends out a thundering roar, decreasing the move bar of all enemies by 30% and dispels 1 buff from them. Then he enters Demoniac State for 2 turns. This skill can only be used when he is not in his Demoniac State. Demoniac State (鬼王の姿) General, Mark: Sets the world ablaze. At the start of an ally's turn, 24% of their current HP is burned away and they become immune to all forms of damage for that turn. HP burning is consider as losing HP and can remove Sleep. | Upgrades: L2: Number of buffs dispelled increases to 2.; L3: When Demoniac State ends, recovers all allies' HP by 20% of the damage SP Shuten Douji dealt during the state.; L4: Decrease to move bar increases to 40%.; L5: When an ally is burned and if their HP drops below 30%, all control effects on them are removed.

skills.name: Listen Up (听咱一言/話を聞いてくれ)
skills.desc: Hoshiguma Douji attack a single target with his harsh words, dealing damage equal to 100% of his ATK. If the target is inflicted with Confuse after the attack, he has a 40% chance of making them launch a normal attack. | Upgrades: L2: Chance of launching a normal attack increases to 50%.; L3: Chance of launching a normal attack increases to 60%.; L4: Chance of launching a normal attack increases to 80%.; L5: Chance of launching a normal attack increases to 100%.

skills.name: Spare the Innocent (刀下留人/ちょっと待った)
skills.desc: Hoshiguma Douji gains immunity to confusion. When receiving a normal attack, and if he is not immobile, he has a 25% chance to Dodge the attack and command the Wine Demon in his bowl to inflict the attacker with Confuse, lasts for 1 turn. When Confuse wears off on an enemy, Hoshiguma Douji's move bar is increased by 10%. If Confuse is dispelled, his move bar is increased by 20% instead. Dodge Grants immunity to all damage from normal attacks, including normal attacks from Assist or Call to Arms. Also grants immunity to any debuffs or control effects inflicted with normal attacks. | Upgrades: L2: Chance to Dodge increases to 30%.; L3: Chance to Dodge increases to 35%.; L4: Chance to Dodge increases to 40%.; L5: Chance to Dodge increases to 45%.

skills.name: The Enemy is There! (敌在酒碗处/敵は酒の杯にある！)
skills.desc: Hoshiguma Douji throws his wine bowl at an enemy, inflicting them with 5 layers of Accused, lasts until the end of battle or until or all layers are lost. Then, he has a 25% base chance to inflict all enemies with Confuse, lasts for 1 turn. The next Listen Up he uses will have an additional effect: also has a 40% base chance to inflict Confuse on the target, lasts for 1 turn. Accused (攻撃の的) Debuff, Mark: Increases the damage received from normal attacks by 20%, and becomes a priority target for anyone with Confuse. When receiving a normal attack, 1 layer of Accused is lost. Only 1 layer can be lost for each action taken. | Upgrades: L2: Base chance to inflict Confuse increases to 28%.; L3: Base chance to inflict Confuse increases to 32%.; L4: Base chance to inflict Confuse increases to 36%.; L5: Base chance to inflict Confuse increases to 40%.

skills.name: Intangible Blade (無剣)
skills.desc: SP Onikiri slashes a single target, dealing damage equal to 100% of his ATK. | Upgrades: L2: Damage increases to 105%.; L3: Damage increases to 110%.; L4: Damage increases to 115%.; L5: Damage increases to 125%.

skills.name: Unshaken Will (真剣・刃心)
skills.desc: Onikiri is even more tenacious after being reforged. SP Onikiri gains a 20% permanent damage reduction. At the end of an enemy's turn, his move bar is increased by 10% until he enters Bkade of the Mind state for the first time. When he takes a normal attack, and if he is not Immobile, has a 60% chance to parry the attack. When a parry is triggered, inflicts Silence on the attacker for 1 turn, granted immunity to the damage and his move bar is increased by 10%. Upon Usage SP Onikiri enters Blade of the Mind state, increases his move bar by 40% and inflicts Shadow Cut on an enemy. Then casts Shadowy Double. Blade of the Mind (心剣) General, Mark: Grants immunity to control effects. While in this state, the enemy with Shadow Cut cannot counter-attack him or receive Call to Arms against him. At the start of his turn and if the enemy's Shadow Cut has been removed, Blade of the Mind is also removed. Shadow Cut (影切) Debuff, Mark: The enemy is marked and locked on by the Shadowy double, cannot be affected by move bar effects. This mark can be removed if the target with Shadow Cut using normal attacks on SP Onikiri or when SP Onikiri takes 5 normal attacks. If the enemy's Shadow Cut is not removed at the end of SP Onikiri's turn, increases Shadow Cut Count by 3. Max of 5 Counts. Shadowy Double (影分身) Inherits all the current stats of SP Onikiri. At the start of a turn, the double disappears if the enemy's Shadow Cut is removed. Otherwise, the double launches the same attack as SP Onikiri when he attacks on his turn against the enemy's with Shadow Cut. (Summoned directly in-front of SP Onikiri. Does not use ally summon spot.) Crit RES Source of damage has its Crit reduced. | Upgrades: L2: Permanent damage reduction increases to 30%.; L3: Chance to parry increases to 80%.; L4: Each parry triggered increases damage dealt by 30% (max 5 layers).; L5: When taking lethal damage, uses Unshaken Will on the source of the damage, recovers 50% of his max HP, increases his Crit RES by 100% for 1 turn and increases his move bar by 30%. Only triggers once each round.

skills.name: Heavenly Blade: Evilslayer (天剣・断悪斬)
skills.desc: SP Onikiri raises his blade high and conjures an illusory demon warrior to strike an enemy, dealing damage equal to 263% of his ATK. If the target is not already inflicted with Endangered, inflicts Endangered on them. Endangered (危) Debuff, Mark: Decreases healing received by 75%, decreases SPD by 20 and decreases DEF by 20%. The next 3 attacks received from normal attacks or special skills dealt to the enemy ignore shields, cannot be shared, and won't trigger the enemy's soul or passive. Then, this mark is removed. Endangered can only be inflicted on 1 enemy at a time. | Upgrades: L2: Damage increases to 289%.; L3: Damage increases to 302%.; L4: When the enemy with Shadow Cut uses a special skill, the Shadowy Double immediately uses this skill on them, dealing 30% less damage.; L5: Onibi costs decreases by 2 if he's in the Blade of the Mind state and increases his Move Bar by 40% after using this skill.

skills.name: Falling Shadow (落影)
skills.desc: Ungaikyou casts the power of chaos at a single target, dealing damage equal to 100% of their attack. While in Yang state, this skill changes to Dharma. | Upgrades: L2: Damage increases to 105%.; L3: Damage increases to 110%.; L4: Damage increases to 115%.; L5: Damage increases to 125%.

skills.name: Dharma (曇無)
skills.desc: Ungaikyou casts the power of an artifact to attack a single target dealing damage equal to 200% of their DEF. Also increases the move of an ally at the beginning of the turn order by 20%. While in Yin state, this skill changes to Fallen Shadow. | Upgrades: L2: Damage increases to 240%.; L3: Damage increases to 280%.; L4: Damage increases to 320%.; L5: Damage increases to 360%.

skills.name: Shifting of the Sky (闘転)
skills.desc: Ungaikyou lives in the Mirror Realm where their 2 faces are independent on each other. They can change between their Yin/Yang states. Their starting HP is halved. The HP in Yin and Yang states compliment to each other. Upon Usage Ungaikyou enters the Yang state and inverts their HP to Yang's HP. Also increases their speed by 100, lasts for 1 turn. Each subsequent use of this skill permanently increases the onibi cost by 2. Mirror Realm (鏡の世界) Ungaikyo cannot be healed, but will 50% of healing effects are converted into a shield that lasts for 2 turns. Yin/Yang (陰/陽) Yin/Yang are the 2 unique states that belong to Ungaikyou. When in Yin state, their ATK is increased by 200% of their initial DEF, and Yang state increases DEF by 10% of their initial ATK. When in Yang state, their DEF is increased by 10% of their initial ATK. Their HP in the Yin and Yang states compliment to each other. If Ungaikyou receives damage while in the Yin state, Yin state's HP will decrease while Yang state's HP will increase and vice versa. Their starting HP is halved, each state starts battle with 50% HP. At the start of the battle, if Ungaikyou's initial ATK is more than 500% of their initial DEF, they will enter the Yin state; otherwise, they enter the Yang state.

skills.name: Shifting of the Stars (昭回)
skills.desc: Upon Usage Ungaikyou enters the Yin state and inverts their HP to Yin's HP. Also increases their SPD by 100, lasts for 1 turn. Each subsequent use of this skill permanently increases the onibi cost by 2.

skills.name: World Purge (雲岸清空)
skills.desc: To cleanse all filthy from the world, Ungaikyou attacks all enemies dealing damage equal to 131% of their ATK. Also has a 100% base chance to inflict Mirror's Wrath on them, lasts until the end of the round. They then send out a Black Lotus plunging upon 1 enemy, dealing damage equal to 131% of their ATK. While in Yang state, this skill changes to Painful Life. Mirror's Wrath (鏡怒) Debuff, Status: This effect is consumed the next time the inflicted enemy receives a dispellable buff to negate it. | Upgrades: L2: Damage for Cleansing and Black Lotus increases to 135%; L3: Damage for Cleansing and Black Lotus increases to 139%.; L4: Damage for Cleansing and Black Lotus increases to 145%.; L5: For each 30% of HP decreased in Yin state, Black Lotus deals an additional attack.

skills.name: Painful Life (苦海浮生)
skills.desc: Ungaikyou gains Mirror's Protection while in Yang state. While in Yin state, this skill changes to World Purge. Upon Usage Ungaikyou grants Mirror's Protection to an ally, lasts until the end of the round. Up to 2 allies can have Mirror's Protection at the same time. Also increases the move bar of all allies by 20%. All Mirror's Protections are when entering Yang state. Mirror's Protection (鏡護) Buff, Status: When inflicted with a debuff or a control effect, 1 will be immediately dispelled and increases the move bar by 10%. This dispel effect can only be triggered once each turn. When this effect is triggered, restores the ally with the lowest HP by 240% of Ungaikyou's DEF. When an ally loses Mirror's Protection, they gain Mirror Shield. Mirror Shield (鏡盾) Buff, Status: Shield that can absorb damage equal to 680% Ungaikyou's max DEF, lasts for 2 turns. | Upgrades: L2: Mirror's Protection: Restored HP increases to 480%.; L3: Mirror's Protection: Number of debuffs or control effect that can be dispelled increases to 2.; L4: Mirror's Protection: Boost to move bar increases to 20%.; L5: For each 30% of HP decreased in Yang state, onibi cost will be decreased by 1.

skills.name: Arrival of Death (天誅)
skills.desc: Kidoumaru unleashes his chains to attack a single target twice, dealing damage equal to 50% of his ATK with each hit. Also has a 30% of inflicting Bone Lock on the target. If no enemies have Bone Lock, the chance increases to 100%. Bone Lock (骸の鎖) Debuff, Mark: Decreases SPD by 20 and ATK by 30%. Also prevents the target's place on the move bar from being altered. Lasts for 2 turns. When Kidoumaru deals damage, he'll deal additional damage equal to 60% of his ATK on targets with Bone Lock. This resets Bone Lock turns. Demon Madness (狂) Buff, Mark: Increases SPD by 20 and damage dealt by 30%. Max 3 layers. | Upgrades: L2: Damage increases to 53%.; L3: Damage increases to 56%.; L4: Damage increases to 59%.; L5: Attacking an enemy with Bone Lock grants Kidoumaru gains 1 layer of Demon Madness at the end of his turn.

skills.name: Demon Outfit (残月鬼衣)
skills.desc: Exclusive effect. Kidoumaru enters the Asura state when he has 3 layers of Demon Madness. When he's in Asura state, he uses Soul Hunter on all enemies at the end of an enemy's turn. Demon Madness (狂) Buff, Mark: Increases SPD by 20 and damage dealt by 30%. Max 3 layers. Asura (修羅) Buff, Mark: Gains a shield that can absorb 120% of his ATK and immunity to control effects. Asura state ends when Soul Hunter is used 3 times or the shield fails, clearing all layers of Demon Madness on him and all Bone Locks on enemies. | Upgrades: L2: Absorption increases to 130%.; L3: Absorption increases to 140%.; L4: Absorption increases to 150%.; L5: Absorption increases to 160%.

skills.name: Soul Hunter (猟魂狂殺)
skills.desc: Kidoumaru launches an attack on all enemies dealing damage equal to 32% of his ATK. Damage dealt by this skill won't trigger the enemies' souls. | Upgrades: L2: Damage increases to 34%.; L3: Damage increases to 36%.; L4: Damage increases to 40%.; L5: When Asura state ends, each Bone Lock removed recovers Kidoumaru's HP by 25% of his max HP.

skills.name: Asura Chains (修羅骸鎖)
skills.desc: Exclusive effect. Kidoumaru launches a 3-strike attack on a single target dealing damage equal to 70% of his ATK and inflicts them with Bone Lock. Kidoumaru then enters Hidden Secret state and gains a layer of Demon Madness at the end of turn. If he is already in Hidden Secret state, he cannot re-enter the state again. Bone Chains (骸の鎖) Debuff, Mark: Decreases SPD by 20 and ATK by 30%. Also prevents the target's place on the move bar from being altered. Lasts for 2 turns. When Kidoumaru deals damage, he'll deal additional damage equal to 60% of his ATK on targets with Bone Lock. This resets Bone Lock turns. Hidden Secret (ステルス) Buff, Mark: Enemy skills cannot target Kidoumaru, lasts 3 turns. Kidoumaru takes 20% less damage and his attacks inflict additional true damage equal to 33% of his ATK. Hidden Secret state ends after he launches an attack. Demon Madness (狂) Buff, Mark: Increases SPD by 20 and damage dealt by 30%. Max 3 layers. | Upgrades: L2: Damage increases to 75%.; L3: Damage increases to 80%.; L4: Damage increases to 90%.; L5: Upper Hand: At the start of battle Kidoumaru automatically enters Hidden Secret state.

skills.name: River Water (清流)
skills.desc: SP Kingyo Hime channels a stream of water to attack a single target, dealing damage equal to 80% of her ATK and dispels 1 of the target's buffs. When an ally receives damage from an enemy and the damage exceeds more than 30% of their max HP, the attacker is inflicted with Grudged for 2 turns. Grudged (因縁) Debuff, Status: ATK is reduced by 20%. Cannot be stacked. | Upgrades: L2: Damage increases to 85%.; L3: Damage increases to 90%.; L4: Damage increases to 95%.; L5: Damage increases to 100%.

skills.name: Ride Wave (凌波)
skills.desc: At the end of an enemy's turn, SP Kingyo Hime gains 1 layer of Focused and creates a shield to protect herself if she does not already have one. The shield can absorb 80% of her ATK. Upper Hand SP Kingyo Hime automatically gains 4 layers of Focused. Focused (精神統一) General, Mark: Max 8 stacks. When SP Kingyo Hime reaches 8 stacks, all stacks are consumed, all control effects on her are removed and all enemies are inflicted with River's Binding, lasts for 2 turns. Then activates Fishtail Embrace, lasts for 1 turn. If she already has Fishtail Embrace, her move bar is increased by 25% instead. River's Binding (川流の縛) Debuff, Mark: When an inflicted enemy receives a single target move bar increasing effect, SP Kingyo Hime focuses spiritual fish energy to reverse the flow, decreasing their SPD by 40% at the end of their turn.

skills.name: Goldfish's Embrace (霊魚の心)
skills.desc: Exclusive effect. SP Kingyo Hime increases the move bar by 10% for all allies and activates Fishtail Embrace, lasts for 1 turn. As long as it is active, and she is not immobile, restores the HP of an ally by 50% of her ATK at the end of their own turn. Also, deals indirect damage equal to 50% of her attack to a random enemy. Enemies with Grudged are prioritized and the damage dealt to them is increased to 100% of her ATK. After the attack, the Grudged on them is consumed. Grudged (因縁) Debuff, Status: ATK is decreased by 20%. Cannot be stacked. | Upgrades: L2: Damage dealt to enemies with Karma increases to 300%.; L3: Fishtail Embrace: Decreases non-crit damage dealt to allies by 30%.; L4: Restore effects on allies with less than 50% HP increases to 200%.; L5: Onibi cost is reduced by 1.

skills.name: Moonlit Flower (月下花)
skills.desc: This is your bond with a goddess' wrath! Enmusubi no Kami wields a moonlit flower to summon a crushing mark of bonds to attack a single target dealing damage equal to 100% of her ATK. | Upgrades: L2: Damage increases to 105%.; L3: Damage increases to 110%.; L4: Damage increases to 115%.; L5: Also increases her move bar by 20%.

skills.name: Flower Moon (緋色花月)
skills.desc: Exclusive effect. At the start of another ally's turn, Enmusubi no Kami grants them 1 Knot of a random type (max 4 types). If Knot they receive is the same type as the one granted to the last ally that took an action (other than Enmusubi no Kami), a match is formed. Then 1 onibi will be immediately gain and Enmusubi no Kami will gain 1 layer of Fateful Bond. If a match is not formed, she will gain 1 layer of Frustration. Fateful Bond (縁) General, Mark: Max 7 layers. Upon using Blessed Bond, each layer of Fateful Bond increases damage dealt for allies by 5% and increases Enmusubi no Kami's healing by 1%. Frustration (怒った) Common, Mark: Max 5 layers. When Enmusubi no Kami gains 5 layers of Frustration, all layers are consumed to dispel or remove all control effects on her and decreases move bar of all enemies by 25%. She loses 2 layers when a match is formed. Remove Removes non-dispellable control effects such as Deep Freeze, Transform, Daze and Provoke.

skills.name: Blessed Bond (神賜良縁)
skills.desc: Enmusubi no Kami blesses an ally, granting them Shelter and also boosts the morale of all non-summoned allies, increasing their damage dealt by 40%, lasts for 1 turn. Then restores the HP for all allies by 9% of her max HP. Flame Reignited (前世の縁) General, Mark: At the end of the blessed ally's turn, they are granted a new turn. Skills used in this new turn costs -3 onibi. Shelter Negates all controlling effects inflicted by a single skill. | Upgrades: L2: When she has at least 1 layer of Fateful Bond, 50% of the excess healing will be converted to a shield.; L3: When she has at least 3 layers of Fateful Bond, increases SPD for all allies' by 30.; L4: When she has at least 7 layers of Fateful Bond, the blessed ally is granted Flame Reignited and she gains Shelter.; L5: Upper Hand: At the start of battle, she automatically gains Shelter.

skills.name: Floating Flame (浮光)
skills.desc: SP Aoandon forms a butterfly out of a scorching blue flame to attack a single target, dealing damage equal to 100% of her ATK. Also inflicts Light Drain on them, lasts for 2 turns. Light Drain (奪火) Debuff, Status: Using skills for the first time cost an extra 1 onibi, lasts for 2 turns. Does not apply to monsters or summoned entities. | Upgrades: L2: Increases damage to 105%.; L3: Increases damage to 110%.; L4: Increases damage to 115%.; L5: Increases damage to 120%.

skills.name: Lights On (煢灯焕夜)
skills.desc: Exclusive effect. SP Aoandon re-writes the ending of all lives, permanently gaining Unextinguished. When inflicting Light Drain on an enemy already inflicted with it again removes 2 onibi from them and SP Aoandon collects the removed onibi. SP Aoandon collects all the onibi you have gained. Whenever she collects 30 onibi, she immediately uses Lantern of Death with no onibi cost. Whenever she collects 100 onibi, she gains the additional skill Final Chapter. Unextinguished (不滅) General, Mark: SP Aoandon gains 1 stack for each onibi collected, max 100 stacks. The stacks don't reset when she is revived after being KO'd. Each stack increases the ATK and DEF for all allies by 1%. Light Drain (奪火) Debuff, Status: Using skills for the first time cost an extra 1 onibi, lasts for 2 turns. Does not apply to monsters or summonable entities. | Upgrades: L2: Collects all your overflow onibi.; L3: Collects 1 onibi when an ally uses a special skill.; L4: Collects all onibi spent on skills used by enemies with Light Drain.; L5: When you gain onibi from the onibi bar, gain 1 additional onibi and the onibi bar fills up by 1 extra slot at the end of SP Aoandon's turn.

skills.name: Final Chapter (浮世終活)
skills.desc: SP Aoandon consumes all 100 of the onibi collected to launch a 4-strike attack on all enemies with each strike dealing damage equal to 1200% of her ATK. Damage is shared equally among all enemies.

skills.name: Lantern of Death (告死瞑灯)
skills.desc: The Lantern of Death falls, heralding impending doom. SP Aoandon attacks a single target dealing damage equal to 211% of her ATK and inflicts them with Light Drain, lasts for 2 turns. Then attacks all other enemies dealing damage equal to 105% of her ATK and inflicts Light Drain on 2 random enemies, priority is given to enemies not inflicted with it, lasts for 2 turns. Light Drain (奪火) Debuff, Status: Using skills for the first time cost an extra 1 onibi, lasts for 2 turns. Does not apply to monsters or summonable entities. | Upgrades: L2: Damage increases to 216% and 110%.; L3: Damage increases to 221% and 115%.; L4: Damage increases to 226% and 120%.; L5: Damage increases to 231% and 125%.

skills.name: Tornado: Shuriken (竜巻・手裏剣)
skills.desc: Fuuri uses his short sword to attack a single target, dealing damage equal to 100% of his ATK. Then grants himself Sprint, lasts for 1 turn. Sprint (奔襲) Buff, Status: SPD is increased by 30. | Upgrades: L2: Damage increases to 105%.; L3: Damage increases to 110%.; L4: Damage increases to 115%.; L5: Damage increases to 125%.

skills.name: Afterimage: Decoy (残影・変わり身の術)
skills.desc: When Fuuri receives a normal attack, and if he is not immobile, he has a 10% chance to Dodge the attack. If he manages to Dodge, he gains 40% of Crit RES, lasts for 2 turns. When attacking an enemy, Fuuri enters Paper Tiger state. Dodge Grants immunity to all damage from normal attacks, including normal attacks from Assist or Call to Arms. Also grants immunity to any debuffs or control effects inflicted with normal attacks. Paper Tiger (弱者いじめ) When Fuuri deals damage (including Shrapnel Tombs), ignores 300 DEF if the target's ATK is lower than his own and reduces his own Crit by 80% if the target's ATK is higher. | Upgrades: L2: Chance to Dodge increases to 20%.; L3: Chance to Dodge increases to 30%.; L4: Chance to Dodge increases to 40%.; L5: Crit RES increases to 100%.

skills.name: Windmill: Shrapnel Tomb (風車・雷火弾)
skills.desc: Fuuri wields his giant shuriken with agility to attack an enemy, dealing damage equal to 100% of his ATK. Then inflicts them with Shrapnel Tomb. The next time he uses this skill, Shrapnel Tomb will detonate dealing indirect damage equal to 175% of his ATK. Shrapnel Tomb (雷火弾) General, Mark: When detonated, deals indirect damage equal to 175% of Fuuri's ATK. It is removed after being detonated. After each detonation, the ignore DEF for Fuuri's Paper Tiger state is increased by 50 (cannot exceed 300). | Upgrades: L2: Damage increases to 110%.; L3: Damage increases to 115%.; L4: Damage increases to 125%.; L5: Indirect damage increases to 350%.

skills.name: Scorpion Sting (蠍刺)
skills.desc: Sasori Onna flashes towards a single target and slashes them twice with her tail and claws, dealing damage equal to 50% of her ATK with each slash. | Upgrades: L2: Damage increases to 52%.; L3: Damage increases to 54%.; L4: Damage increases to 56%.; L5: Damage increases to 60%.

skills.name: Dark Remedy (以毒攻毒)
skills.desc: When Scorpion Venom is detonated and deals damage, Sasori Onna's HP is recovered by 20% of the damage dealt. Each layer of Scorpion Venom increases Sasori Onna's ATK by 20%. Scorpion Venom (蠍毒) Debuff, Mark: Exclusive effect. Each layer decreases the target's DEF by 80, max 5 layers. Increases by 1 layer after it is detonated. Decreases by 1 layer when the target's HP is healed by 100% of her ATK. | Upgrades: L2: Scorpion Venom also inflicts 40% of Healing Down on the target.; L3: Recovered HP from detonated Scorpion Venom increases to 30%.; L4: When there is 1 or more layers of Scorpion Venom, each layer inflicts 10% of Healing Down on the target.; L5: After the target with 5 layers of Scorpion Venom receives indirect damage, also deals additional indirect damage equal to 60% of the damage they took to all other enemies (cannot exceed 800% of her ATK).

skills.name: Vicious Venom (百蠍の毒)

Scorpion Venom (蠍毒) Debuff, Mark: Exclusive effect. Each layer decreases the target's DEF by 80, max 5 layers. Increases by 1 layer after it is detonated. Decreases by 1 layer when the target's HP is healed by 100% of her ATK. | Upgrades: L2: Indirect damage increases to 80%.; L3: Indirect damage increases to 85%.; L4: Indirect damage increases to 90%.; L5: Scorpion Venom detonates at the end of the target's turn, dealing indirect damage equal to 90% of her ATK.

skills.name: Shadowchaser (逐影)

skills.name: Mountain's Soul: Ultra (麓魂・极)

Crit RES Source of damage has its Crit reduced. | Upgrades: L2: After using this skill, the move bar for all allies is increased by 10%.; L3: As long as she has Obligated Duty, her RES increased by 50%.; L4: As long as she has Obligated Duty, her Crit RES increased by 200%.; L5: When she gains Obligated Duty and if the targeted enemy is not immobile, they are forced to gain a new turn and launch a normal attack at Suzuka Gozen (monsters or summonable enemies are unaffected).

skills.name: Crashing Barrage (万羽浪行)

skills.name: Bind Heart (纏心)

skills.name: Bone Corrosion (蝕骨)

The next time this enemy takes damage, they will lose an amount of max HP equal to that lethal damage (max of 20%). Resentment (恐) General, Mark: For every 1% of initial max HP lost, decreases ATK by 1% and increases damage received by 1%. (Mark is represented by a skull floating above the enemy.) Burning Resentment (怨火) Debuff, Status: At the start of turn, receive indirect damage equal to SP Kiyohime's ATK at the start of turn. Serpent (蛇霊) A special summoned entity, cannot receive damage. The Serpent returns when the enemy with Resentment is KO'd. All control effects and similar effects such as Banish on SP Kiyohime are removed. She also absorbs 40% of all the enemy's stats (absorbed ATK and HP cannot exceed SP Kiyohime's). (Uses ally summon spot.) | Upgrades: L2: After the Serpent attacks, SP Kiyohime's move bar is increased by 30%.; L3: The Serpent immediately launches an attack after being summoned.; L4: When the Serpent is on the battlefield, grants SP Kiyohime 40% of damage reduction.; L5: At the end of turn for the enemy with Resentment, the Serpent will launch an attack on them.

skills.name: Bewitching Eyes (降蠱の瞳)

Bewitching Stare (瞳蠱) Debuff, Mark: Triggers when the inflicted target receives healing and consumes 1 layer to nullify the effect. skills.desc: SP Kiyohime launches a 3-strike attack on an enemy, dealing damage equal to 70% of her ATK with each strike and inflicts all enemies with a layer of Bewitching Stare, sustained for 3 turns.

Converted into Mountain Crush after taking an action. Mountain's Crush (麓圧) Debuff, Mark: Overall SPD is reduced by 30% and inflicts , lasts until the start of the next turn. | Upgrades: L2: Damage increases to 200%.; L3: Damage increases to 220%.; L4: Damage increases to 240%.; L5: Before dealing damage, dispel 1 buff from all enemies.

Then Briskey gains 40 MP.

Dormant (沈眠) SP Higanbana becomes immobile, immune to damage, debuffs and control effects. When all Nether Seeds are cleared, all Nether Flowers on her are removed and she will leave her Dormant state. | Upgrades: L2: Whenever she leaves her Dormant state, her ATK is permanently increased by 10% (max 3 layers).; L3: Onibi cost for Root Out increases by 1.; L4: Whenever she leaves her Dormant state, the number max number of Nether Flowers converted from Nether Seeds increases by 1 (max 6).; L5: Upper Hand: Automatically uses Withering Blooms at the start of a battle.

At the end of every enemies' turn, Nezuko attacks the enemy at the top of the move bar with Flying Kick. skills.desc: SP Kaguya Hime turns the glowing moon cocoon into a crystal kaleidoscope to attack all enemies dealing damage equal to 138% of her ATK and issues a Call to Arms to allies under Wish's Protection. Cannot exceed 120% Crit DMG and 200 DEF. | Upgrades: L2: Each point of Wish Power granted, increases her Crit DMG by 5% (max of 120%).; L3: Each point of Wish Power granted, she creates a shield that can absorb 12% of her max HP (max 8 layers and lasts for 2 turns).; L4: When she has 12 points of Wish Power, this skill will ignore enemy passives and souls.; L5: When she has 24 points of Wish Power, Inaba Rabbit will be summoned and the skill Cleansing Moon will trigger.

skills.name: Cleansing Moon (月の洗礼)
skills.desc: Inaba Rabbit becomes Winged Tsukinohime who launches another attack on all enemies, dealing damage equal to 153% of SP Kaguya Hime's ATK. The damage from this attack ignores the enemy passives and souls.

skills.name: Crimson Child (赤子)
skills.desc: Yato no Kami releases a Bat to bite a single target, dealing damage equal to 100% of his ATK. Waltz (共舞) General, Mark: Max 7 layers. Each stack increases his move bar by 10%. | Upgrades: L2: Damage increases to 105%.; L3: Damage increases to 110%.; L4: Damage increases to 115%.; L5: Damage increases to 125% and grants him a 50% chance to gain 1 layer of Waltz.

skills.name: Invite of the Night (夜の邀約)
skills.desc: When Yato no Kami deals damage, he inflicts 15% HP Steal. Each time he releases 1 Bat, he gains 1 stack of Waltz. When he has 7 stacks, and if he's not immobile, consumes all stacks of Waltz to launche a 3-strike attack on the enemy with the lowest HP, dealing true damage equal to 77% of his ATK with each strike. Waltz (共舞) General, Mark: Max 7 layers. Each stack increases his move bar by 10%. Nightfall (夜幕) Causes the summoned entity to be regarded as having left the battlefield. This means it is temporarily considered unplayable, immobile, its place on move bar cannot be changed, all skill effects are sealed, and cannot receive buffs or debuffs. Has no effect on monsters. (Dark smoke and 3 moons will circle around the enemy summon.)

skills.name: Seven-Night Ritual (七夜秘儀)
skills.desc: Exclusive effect. At the start of battle, Yato no Kami is granted the Shelter of Night, it increases his damage reduction by 49% and RES by 70%. Upon Usage Yato no Kami releases 3 Bats which launch an attack on 1 enemy, dealing damage equal to 210% of his attack and inflicts Sigil of the Night on them, lasts for 1 turn. When a Sigil of the Night effect is triggered, his damage reduction and RES are decreased by 7% and 10% then he deals true damage equal 100% of his ATK to all enemies. The damage doesn't trigger his or the enemies' souls. Sigil of the Night (夜の禊) Debuff, Mark: Exclusive effect. There are 7 types of Sigils, each lasts for 1 turn. Doesn't effect monsters, summoned entities and onmyoji. At the start of an inflicted target's turn, they will need to choose the trigger timing and effect from 2 random types of Sigils. A chosen type won't appear again until Sigil of the Night resets. When the effect of 7 types have been triggered, and if Yato no Kami is not immobile, Sigil of the Night will reset and he will launch a 3-strike attack on random enemies, dealing true damage equal to 77% of his ATK with each strike. | Upgrades: L2: Damage increases to 270%.; L3: When Sigil of the Night resets, increases the attack to 7 strikes.; L4: When Sigil of the Night resets, each strike also decreases the enemy's move bar by 20%.; L5: Onibi cost decreases to 3.

skills.name: Sigil 1: Seal Breath (一の禊・止息)
skills.desc: At the start of the inflicted target's turn, they must select which effect to activate. Skip Own Turn: Removes 2 onibi from the enemy. Triggers At End of Own Turn: Removes 2 onibi from the enemy and permanently decreases their max onibi by 2.

skills.name: Sigil 2: Blight Soul (二の楔・涸魂)
skills.desc: At the start of the inflicted target's turn, they must select which effect to activate. Skip Own Turn: The move bar for the enemy at the top of the turn order is decreased by 30%. Triggers At End of Own Turn: The move bar for all enemies is decreased by 20% and for all allies it is increased by 20%.

skills.name: Sigil 3: Drain Blood (三の禊・竭血)
skills.desc: At the start of the inflicted target's turn, they must select which effect to activate. Skip Own Turn: Causes all enemies to receive true damage equal to 100% of Yato no Kami's ATK. Triggers At End of Own Turn: Causes all enemies to receive true damage equal to 200% of Yato no Kami's ATK. Also recovers the HP of all allies by 80% of the damage dealt, the recovered amount is shared evenly among all allies.

skills.name: Sigil 4: Corrosion (四の禊・腐髄)
skills.desc: At the start of the inflicted target's turn, they must select which effect to activate. Skip Own Turn: The target's Crit is decreased by 80%, lasts for 2 turns. Triggers At End of Own Turn: The target's Crit is decreased by 100% and the Crit for all other enemies is also decreased by 80%, lasts for 2 turns.

skills.name: Sigil 5: Shake Bone(五の禊・震骨)
skills.desc: At the start of the inflicted target's turn, they must select which effect to activate. Skip Own Turn: Causes the target to have a 100% base chance of having their passive and soul effects to be Sealed, lasts for 2 turns. Triggers At End of Own Turn: Cause the target and 3 random enemies to have a 100% base chance of having their passive and soul effects to be Sealed, lasts for 2 turns.

skills.name: Sigil 6: Harm Heart (六の禊・禍心)
skills.desc: At the start of the inflicted target's turn, they must select which effect to activate. Skip Own Turn: Causes the target to have an 80% base chance to being inflicted with Confuse, lasts for 1 turns. Triggers At End of Own Turn: Causes the target to have a 100% base chance to be inflicted with Confuse and a 60% base chance to inflict Confuse on all other enemies, lasts for 2 turns.

skills.name: Sigil 7: Seal Life (七の禊・封命)
skills.desc: At the start of the inflicted target's turn, they must select which effect to activate. Skip Own Turn: The target's max HP is permanently decreased by 50%. Triggers At End of Own Turn: The max HP for all enemies is permanently decreased by 30%.

skills.name: Shadowstrike (影襲)
skills.desc: Kagewani calls the Shadow to burrow underground and aim at a single target, dealing damage equal to 100% of his ATK. | Upgrades: L2: Damage increases to 105%.; L3: Damage increases to 110%.; L4: Damage increases to 115%.; L5: Damage increases to 125%.

skills.name: Shadowshell (影殻)
skills.desc: When Kagewani attacks with Shadowstrike or Overshadow, he has a 40% base chance of inflicting enemies with Shadowprey, lasts for 2 turns. Shadowprey (影食) Debuff, Status: Max of 2 stacks. When an inflicted enemy has 2 stacks, consumes all stacks and they are dealt shield ignoring damage equal to 15% of Kagewani's ATK. | Upgrades: L2: Base chance increases to 50%.; L3: Damage increases to 30%.; L4: Base chance increases to 60%.; L5: When Shadowprey is consumed, also restores his HP by 3% of his max HP.

skills.name: Overshadow (幕影蓋地)
skills.desc: Kagewani encourages himself with a "poi" and launches a 2-strike attack on all enemies, dealing damage equal to 30% of his ATK with each strike. Then the Shadow lunges at 1 enemy, dealing damage equal to 60% of his ATK and has a 20% base chance to inflict Shadowbound, lasts for 1 turn. | Upgrades: L2: Damage for the lunge attack increases to 70%.; L3: Base chance increases to 35%.; L4: Damage for the lunge attack increases to 80%.; L5: Base chance increases to 50%.

skills.name: Shake Bell (振铃/振鈴)
skills.desc: Suzuhiko Hime wields her chiming blade and sends fiery flames to attack a single target, dealing damage equal to 100% of her ATK. | Upgrades: L2: Damage increases to 105%.; L3: Damage increases to 110%.; L4: Damage increases to 115%.; L5: Damage increases to 125%.

skills.name: Scorching Fire (铃焰灼心/鈴焔灼心)
skills.desc: Exclusive effect. Suzuhiko Hime cannot be revived when KO'd. When her max HP is below 50%, she permanently gains Holy Fire. Upon Usage Suzuhiko Hime resets the cooldown for Holy Fire, recovers 40% of her max HP and recovers the HP of all other allies by 12% of her max HP. Holy Fire (神火) Buff, Mark: When her HP reaches max HP, and if she not inflicted with Banish and similar effects or control effects, she immediately uses Fire Rite used without any onibi. This effect has a cooldown of 2 turns. | Upgrades: L2: HP required to gain Holy Fire increases to 75%.; L3: When she has Holy Fire, she recovers 8% of her max HP at the end of a non-summoned ally's turn.; L4: When receiving lethal damage, changes this skill to Undying Flame.; L5: When she becomes an Undying Flame, creates an undispellable shield that can absorb damage equal to 120% of her ATK (lasts for 2 turns).

skills.name: Undying Flame (心火永明)
skills.desc: Exclusive effect. The flame my be extinguished, but my heart shall burn for eternity! All buffs and debuffs are removed from Suzuhiko Hime. She stays on the battlefield until the last non-summoned ally is KO'd. While in this state, she gains 100% of Crit RES, her DEF is increased by 100% and she becomes immune to debuffs and effects such as Banish, and becomes immobile. Also increases other allies' Crit RES and DEF by 40%. Upon entering this state and when another non-summoned entity is KO'd, she immediately recovers 50% of her HP. When her HP reaches max HP, she's resurrected, the cooldown for Holy Fire is reset and this skill changes to Scorching Fire.

skills.name: Fire Rite (五山火祭)
skills.desc: Suzuhiko Hime launches an attacks on all enemies, dealing damage equal to 72% of her ATK. Then continues to inflicts strikes on all enemies at the cost of 25% of her own max HP and 1 onibi, dealing damage equal to 43% of her ATK with each strike until she has less than 50% HP or if there isn't enough onibi (or ). This skill cannot trigger healing effects such as restore, recover and HP Steal. If Fire Rite manages to KO a non-summoned enemy, her HP immediately recovers to full. This effect can be triggered once per turn. | Upgrades: L2: HP cost decreases to 21%.; L3: HP cost decreases to 17%.; L4: HP cost decreases to 13%.; L5: When this skill inflicts 5-strikes, the attack will ignore 30 DEF (max of 5 stacks).

skills.name: Ninja Kick! (忍兔飞踢！/忍兎飛踢!)
skills.desc: SP Yama Usagi gets serious and launches a 2-strike attack on a single target twice, dealing damage equal to 50% of her ATK with each strike. | Upgrades: L2: Damage increases to 53%.; L3: Damage increases to 56%.; L4: Damage increases to 59%.; L5: Damage increases to 65%.

skills.name: Ninja Formation! (梦心迷兔阵！/夢心迷兎降!)
skills.desc: Exclusive effect. SP Yama Usagi places 3 Ninja Mines by the enemy's feet. When a Ninja Mines is detonated, and if she is not inflicted with Banish and similar effects or by a control effect, she uses Ninja Dance!! and gains 1 chapter of Ninja Tricks. Whenever non-summoned enemies take 6 turns, 1 control effect will be dispelled from SP Yama Usagi. If she is not inflicted with a control effect and is not immobile, this skill is automatically used once to place 2 Ninja Mines without any onibi. Ninja Mines (迷兔炸弹/迷兎爆弾) Max of 9 can be placed. Place on the move bar is locked on the 50% position. A mine is detonated when an enemy passes by them on the move bar, dealing damage equal to 120% of SP Yama Usagi's ATK. A mine is removed after it's detonated. Ninja Tricks (梦忍法/夢忍法) Buff, Mark: Max of 9 chapters. Each time 1 chapter is used, the damage for Ninja Scurrying Steps! is increased by 20%. After using that skill, all chapters of Ninja Tricks are consumed. | Upgrades: L2: Ninja Mines: Damage dealt also ignores 150 defense.; L3: Ninja Dance!!: ATK increases to 20%.; L4: Ninja Mines: When a mine detonates, also decreases the target's resist by 30%.; L5: Number of enemy turns needed to activate this skill without onibi decreases to 5.

skills.name: Ninja Dance!! (兎忍舞!!)
skills.desc: SP Yama Usagi increases the move bar for all allies by 10% and increases their ATK by 10%, lasts for 2 turns.

skills.name: Ninja Scurrying Steps! (狩梦之乱舞！/狩夢の乱舞!)
skills.desc: SP Yama Usagi has a 10% base chance to inflict 1 enemy with Morph. Then she summons mines to attack all enemies, dealing damage equal to 160% of her ATK. Ninja Mines (迷兔炸弹/迷兎爆弾) Max of 9 can be placed. Place on the move bar is locked on the 50% position. A mine is detonated when an enemy passes by them on the move bar, dealing damage equal to 120% of SP Yama Usagi's ATK. A mine is removed after it's detonated. | Upgrades: L2: Using this skill increases her HIT by 30% (lasts for 2 turns).; L3: Base chance increases to 20%.; L4: Using this skill also places 1 Ninja Mine.; L5: Base chance increases to 30%.

skills.name: Transformation Scythe (化生戟)
skills.desc: Garuda attacks a single target dealing damage equal to 100% of his ATK and Valuable Feather on the target will be consumed. Valuable Feather (惜羽) Debuff, Mark: When the move bar for an inflicted enemy is increased, and if he is not immobile, Garuda will launch 1 normal attack at them. | Upgrades: L2: Damage increases to 105%.; L3: Damage increases to 110%.; L4: Damage increases to 115%.; L5: Damage increases to 125%.

skills.name: Heavenly Wings (天衣妙翅)
skills.desc: When Garuda uses his normal or special attacks, he'll deal an additional 20% of damage to enemies with shields. Exclusive effect. At the end of an enemy's turn, Garuda has a 7% chance to inflict all enemies with Valuable Feather. Valuable Feather (惜羽) Debuff, Mark: When the move bar for an inflicted enemy is increased, and if he is not immobile, Garuda will launch 1 normal attack at them. | Upgrades: L2: Chance increases to 8%.; L3: Chance increases to 9%.; L4: Chance increases to 10%.; L5: When this skill doesn't trigger 5 times in a row, and if he is not inflicted with any control effects, Burning Feathers is immediately used without any onibi.

skills.name: Burning Feathers (龍息燼羽)
skills.desc: Garuda attacks all enemies dealing damage equal to 134% of his ATK and has a 40% base chance to inflict them with Valuable Feather. Valuable Feather (惜羽) Debuff, Mark: When the move bar for an inflicted enemy is increased, and if he is not immobile, Garuda will launch 1 normal attack at them. | Upgrades: L2: Base chance increases to 60%.; L3: Base chance increases to 80%.; L4: Base chance increases to 100%.; L5: When using this skill, enemies are guaranteed to be inflicted with Valuable Feather.

skills.name: Heavy Boulder (重峦/重巒)
skills.desc: Fukengaku harnesses a giant boulder with the power of a mountain god and smashes it at a single target, dealing damage equal to 100% of his ATK. | Upgrades: L2: Damage increases to 105%.; L3: Damage increases to 110%.; L4: Damage increases to 115%.; L5: Damage increases to 125% and increases his own RES by 50% after using this skill (lasts for 2 turns).

skills.name: God of Mountain (古山之神/古山の神)
skills.desc: Exclusive effect. While the Hiking Realm is active, whenever an ally gains a Rock Pattern: Cloud's Color stack, Fukengaku gains a Rock Pattern: Cloud stack and whenever an ally gains Rock Pattern: Mountain Views, he gains a Rock Pattern: Mountain stack. Rock Pattern：Cloud's Color (峦纹·云衣/巒紋・雲衣) Buff, Status: ATK is increased by 200% of Fukengaku's initial DEF (cannot exceed 40% of their initial ATK), lasts for 1 turn. Rock Pattern：Cloud (峦纹·云/巒紋・雲) General, Mark: Max of 5 stacks. Using a normal attack consumes all stacks. Each stack consumed increases all allies' non-crit damage dealt by 3% (max of 15%, cannot exceed 6000% of Fukengaku's initial DEF), lasts for 1 turn. Multiple triggers of this the effect will stack and cause the duration to be refreshed. Rock Pattern：Mountain Views (峦纹·山色/巒紋・山色) Buff, Status: Gain a shield that can absorb damage equal to 350% of Fukengaku's initial DEF and increases RES by 30%, lasts for 1 turn. Rock Pattern：Mountain (峦纹·山/巒紋・山) General, Mark: Max of 5 stacks. Using a normal attack consumes all stacks. Each stack consumed restores the HP for all allies by 100% of his initial DEF. | Upgrades: L2: At the start of his own turn, he randomly gains 1 stack of Rock Pattern: Cloud or Rock Pattern: Mountain.; L3: Each time 1 stack of Rock Pattern: Mountain is consumed, 1 debuff or control effect will be dispelled from a random ally, dispelling control effects is prioritised.; L4: Upper Hand: Automatically gains 1 stack of Rock Pattern: Clouds and Rock Pattern: Mountain at the start of battle.; L5: Duration for the boost to non-crit damage dealt increases to 2 turns.

skills.name: Mountain Hiking (水宿山行/水宿山行)
skills.desc: Exclusive effect. Fukengaku creates a Hiking Realm that lasts for 2 turns. When an ally receives crit damage, if damage dealer has a higher Crit DMG than Fukengaku, the damage is reduced by 0.08% for each 1% of the difference in Crit DMG (cannot exceed 1200% of his initial DEF). When the realm is active, allies gain Rock Pattern: Cloud's Color on their first turn. Then, if an ally uses the same skill they used on their last turn, they gain Rock Pattern: Cloud's Color; if they use a different skill or are inflicted with a control effect, they gain Rock Pattern: Mountain Views at the end of their turn. Rock Pattern：Cloud's Color (峦纹·云衣/巒紋・雲衣) Buff, Status: ATK is increased by 200% of Fukengaku's initial DEF (cannot exceed 40% of their initial ATK), lasts for 1 turn. Rock Pattern：Mountain Views (峦纹·山色/巒紋・山色) Buff, Status: Gain a shield that can absorb damage equal to 350% of Fukengaku's initial DEF and increases RES by 30%, lasts for 1 turn. | Upgrades: L2: When an ally is attacked while the realm is active and if the attacker's Crit DMG is 3 times the amount of Fukengaku's, the attacker's Crit is decreased by 50% on that turn.; L3: Duration of the Hiking Realm increases to 3 turns.; L4: While the realm is active, the ATK for all allies is increased by 50% of Fukengaku's initial DEF (cannot exceed 20% of the allies' respective initial ATK).; L5: Upper Hand: Automatically uses this skill at the start of battle.

skills.name: Decorative Wave (波綴)
skills.desc: One of Umi no Chou's Sea Genies jumps out from the water and attacks a single target, dealing damage equal to 100% of her ATK. | Upgrades: L2: Damage increases to 105%.; L3: Damage increases to 110%.; L4: Damage increases to 115%.; L5: Damage increases to 125%.

skills.name: Revolving Genies (霊巡)
skills.desc: At the end of Umi no Chou's turn, the Sea Genies that revolve around her attach themselves to a random non-summoned ally, sustained for 1 turn. Sea Genie (海霊) General, Mark: Triggers once when receiving an attack, Removed after 3 triggers. Triggers once for multiple enemy attacks in a single turn. When it's triggered, has an 80% base chance to randomly inflict the attacker with the 1 of the following effects for 1 turn: ATK is decreased by 80%, DEF is decreased by 30%, SPD is decreased by 25. | Upgrades: L2: Sea Genie: Seal is added as a random effect.; L3: Sea Genie: Freeze is added as a random effect.; L4: Number of allies Seal Genie can be granted to increases to 2.; L5: Upper Hand: Umi no Chou automatically starts battle with Sea Genie (sustained for 1 turn).

skills.name: Aquatic Heart (海心落)
skills.desc: Umi no Chou focuses the power of the sea to restore the HP of 2 non-summoned allies with the lowest HP proportions by 12% of her max HP. For each ally attached by a Sea Genie at the start of her turn, increases the restored amount by 10%. | Upgrades: L2: HP restored increases to 14%.; L3: When restoring allies' HP, also restores her own HP by 16%.; L4: HP restored increases to 16%.; L5: When restoring allies' HP, their DEF is increased by 20% (lasts for 2 turns).

skills.name: Soul's Punishment (霊魂懲戒)
skills.desc: SP Orochi gazes at the evil in the depth of single target's soul and makes a verdict, dealing damage equal to 100% of his ATK. | Upgrades: L2: Damage increases to 105%.; L3: Damage increases to 110%.; L4: Damage increases to 115%.; L5: Damage increases to 125%.

skills.name: Corrupted Force (神堕之力/神堕の力)
skills.desc: Exclusive effect. SP Orochi is suppressed by a total of 6 Divine Swords: Ama no Habakiri. Using this skill turn himself into The Serpent Lord, storing 6% of the initial ATK of all other allies into 1 Ama no Habakiri to serve as the energy required to break the seal of Ama no Habakiri. When he is KO'd, all stored ATK will be returned. If this skill is used in succession, the onibi cost increases by 1 each time. The Serpent Lord (蛇神) His max HP cannot be changed. Max HP is equal to 200% of his ATK. Has immunity to debuffs and effects such as Banish. When The Serpent Lord removes the suppression of an Ama no Habakiri with Trial Ritual or he receives lethal damage, his original form returns to the battlefield. | Upgrades: L2: The Serpent Lord: Max HP increases to 380%.; L3: Decreases The Serpent Lord's damage received from AOE attacks by 30%.; L4: When The Serpent Lord is KO'd, his SPD is increased by 100 (lasts for 1 turn).; L5: Upper Hand: Automatically uses Corrupted Force at the start of battle.

skills.name: Serpent's Devouring (蛇神之噬/蛇神の噬)
skills.desc: This skill can only be used while in his original form. SP Orochi removes the seal of the 6th Ama no Habakiri and creates the Final Judgement field, then takes the place of your onmyoji for the remainder of the battle. He gains a new turn, changes the skill Trial Ritual changes to Final Judgement, and summons a Corrupted Sword to his previous spot. Also sacrifices all remaining non-summoned allies, turning them into Corrupted Swords and takes 6% of their initial ATK. Corrupted Sword (堕落之剑/堕落の剣) Serves as an Offering to awaken the sealed power of the Evil God. Inherits the stats of the sacrificed ally, except its HP is equal to 310% of SP Orochi's ATK. On its turn, recovers 20% of its own HP, grants 1 onibi and increases SP Orochi's move bar by 15%. Each Corrupted Sword, decreases SP Orochi's damage received by 20%. Offering (献祭/生贄) Regarded as being KO'd. Sacrificed allies cannot be reverted back, don't trigger revival effects and cannot be revived. Final Judgement (终焉审判/終焉裁決) While the field is active, SP Orochi is immune to debuffs and effects such as Banish.

skills.name: Trial Ritual (审判仪式/審判儀式)
skills.desc: This skill can only be used while in The Serpent Lord form. Upon Usage SP Orochi removes the suppression of 1 Ama no Habakiri to attacks all enemies, dealing damage equal to 188% of his ATK and inflicts Corrupted on an ally other than himself. If a total of 5 Ama no Habakiri have been removed, sets free a powerful evil force free and the skill Corrupted Force changes to Serpent's Devouring. The Serpent Lord (蛇神) His max HP cannot be changed. Max HP is equal to 200% of his ATK. Has immunity to debuffs and effects such as Banish. When The Serpent Lord removes the suppression of an Ama no Habakiri with Trial Ritual or he receives lethal damage, his original form returns to the battlefield. Corrupted (堕化) General, Mark: SPD is increased by 40% and corrupts 24% of their current HP at the start of their turn. When the Corrupted ally is KO'd, SP Orochi's move bar is increased by 40% and they are turned into a Corrupted Sword. If the total number of Ama no Habakiri removed is less than 5, removes 1 Ame no Habakiri immediately. | Upgrades: L2: For each 20% of HP The Serpent Lord has, using this skill also recovers his own HP by 12%.; L3: For each 20% of HP The Serpent Lord has, using this skill also increases his move bar by 8%.; L4: For each 20% of HP The Serpent Lord has, using this skill also increases this attack's damage by 25%.; L5: Using this skill withdraws the stored ATK of his allies (cannot exceed 100% of his initial ATK).

skills.name: Final Judgement (终焉审判/終焉裁決)
skills.desc: SP Orochi attacks all enemies dealing damage equal to 313% of his ATK. Then inflicts 4 follow-up strikes on random enemies, dealing damage equal to 128% of his ATK with each strike.

skills.name: White Rouge (頬の色・雪)
skills.desc: Oshiroi Baba throws her compact a single target, dealing damage equal to 80% of her ATK. Makeup (粉妆/粉粧) Debuff, Status: Max of 7 stack, lasts for 2 turns. At the start of turn, deals indirect damage equal to 45% of her ATK. At 7 stacks, removes 5 stacks at the end of turn and has a 100% base chance of inflicting Seal, lasts for 1 turn. | Upgrades: L2: Damage increases to 85%.; L3: Damage increases to 90%.; L4: Damage increases to 95%.; L5: Damage increases to 100% and inflicts 1 stack of Makeup.

skills.name: Colorful Mascara (眸の色・嫣)
skills.desc: Whenever an enemy with Makeup receives an HP restoring effect or move bar increasing effect, Oshiroi Baba inflicts an additional Makeup stack on them (max of 2 stacks each time). Makeup (粉妆/粉粧) Debuff, Status: Max of 7 stack, lasts for 2 turns. At the start of turn, deals indirect damage equal to 45% of her ATK. At 7 stacks, removes 5 stacks at the end of turn and has a 100% base chance of inflicting Seal, lasts for 1 turn.

skills.name: Red Lipstick (唇の色・赤)
skills.desc: Oshiroi Baba inflicts 3 stacks of Makeup on all enemies, lasts for 2 turns. At the start of their turn, each stack deals indirect damage equal to 45% of her ATK. When she receives damage from a normal attack, removes 3 stacks of Makeup from all enemies. Makeup (粉妆/粉粧) Debuff, Status: Max of 7 stack, lasts for 2 turns. At the start of turn, deals indirect damage equal to 45% of her ATK. At 7 stacks, removes 5 stacks at the end of turn and has a 100% base chance of inflicting Seal, lasts for 1 turn. | Upgrades: L2: When receiving damage from a normal attack, number of Makeup stacks removed from all enemies decreases to 1.; L3: If an enemy has 4 or more stacks of Makeup, each stack ignores 30 DEF when dealing damage.; L4: At the end of turn of an enemy with 7 stacks of Makeup, her HP is recovered by 8% of her max HP.; L5: Onibi cost decreases to 2.

skills.name: Verdict of the Dead (亡者裁决)
skills.desc: SP Enma unleashes inferno punishment on a single target, dealing damage equal to 100% of her ATK. Eyes of Enma (阎魔之目/閻魔の目) Debuff, Status: When stacked 3 times, consumes all stacks and converts them into Evil's Imprisonment. Evil's Imprisonment (恶灵刑期/悪霊刑期) Debuff, Mark: If a special skill is not on cooldown, imposes an immediate 1-turn cooldown. Does not effect monsters. For each enemy inflicted with this effect, decreases SP Enma's SPD by 5%. | Upgrades: L2: Damage increases to 105%.; L3: Damage increases to 110%.; L4: Damage increases to 115%.; L5: Damage increases to 125% and has a base chance of inflicting 1 stack of Eyes of Enma .

skills.name: Book of Reincarnation (輪回之薄)
skills.desc: Exclusive effect. At the end of SP Enma's turn, records 40% of the total initial HP of all non-summoned allies in the Book of Reincarnation. When the HP recorded in the Book of Reincarnation is reduced to 0 or an ally is KO'd, as long as she is not inflicted with a control effect or effects such as Banish, uses the skill Requiem Realm without consuming any onibi on the source of the damage.
